creator: kenji.rikitake@acm.org
text:
After upgrading python27-2.7.3 to python27-2.7.3_1,
an application with py27-sqlite3-2.7.3_1 didn't work and
caused the following error:

Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "(application file name hidden)", line 4, in <module>
    from sqlite3 import dbapi2 as sqlite
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/sqlite3/__init__.py", line 24, in <module>
    from dbapi2 import *
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/sqlite3/dbapi2.py", line 27, in <module>
    from _sqlite3 import *
ImportError: /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/_sqlite3.so: Undefined symbol "PyUnicodeUCS4_DecodeUTF8"

Fix: 

Reinstalling databased/py-sqlite3 solved the issue.
How-To-Repeat: Running an application from Python
importing sqlite3 and dbapi2 modules
